privileged_info_summary: The task configures clinical safety protocols in a synthetic LimeSurvey environment. The survey 'Depression Screening - Fall 2024' is created programmatically with a 'safety_check' question that has answer codes Y (Yes) and N (No). The task requires configuring conditional email notifications to dr.patel@clinical-safety.org when safety_check equals Y, creating a text display question with the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline reference, and setting the relevance equation to safety_check == "Y". The 988 number is a real, official national crisis lifeline. All metadata values have been verified against the setup scripts, task description, and verifier logic.
